hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then ruff check "$FILE" --quiet && echo "[lint] $FILE OK" || echo "[lint] $FILE has issues — run ruff check $FILE to see details"; fi'

bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(delete-stack|s3 rb|s3 rm --recursive|iam:Delete|DeleteBucket)"; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -q -- "--confirm"; then echo "[guard] WARN: destructive command allowed due to --confirm"; else echo "[guard] BLOCKED: Destructive AWS command detected. Add --confirm if intentional."; exit 1; fi; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(cat|type|Get-Content|gc)\s+.*(secrets/|secrets\\|\.env|\.aws/credentials|\.aws/config)|printenv|^env$|aws configure get aws_secret_access_key"; then if echo "$CMD" | grep -q -- "--confirm-secret-read"; then echo "[guard] WARN: sensitive read allowed due to --confirm-secret-read"; else echo "[guard] BLOCKED: Sensitive secret read/exfil command detected. Add --confirm-secret-read if explicitly requested."; exit 1; fi; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -d tests ] && ls tests/test_*.py 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q test; then python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=no 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "[tests] Suite passed" || echo "[tests] WARNING: Some tests failed — review before marking complete"; else echo "[tests] No tests yet — skipping test gate"; fi'
